## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New biometric module
- [ ] Enhancement to an existing module

- [ ] Existing tests pass (`just test-py`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (`just check`)
- [ ] No security-sensitive changes that could mislead users into treating this as a production system
- [ ] README updated if behaviour or setup steps changed
- [ ] Both `templates/` (Flask) and `docs/` (static) versions updated if applicable
